title: Vermillion V3 [16x]
description: a simple red pvp pack for 1.8.9
body:
vermillion v3 is a red pvp texture pack for 1.8.9 with many custom items and blocks good for bedwars or skywars or any other 1.8 gamemode

if this texture pack gains enough traction or i just decide to, i will make recolors for this pack
